metadata.title: Acme Health Patient Intake API — GRC Baseline
metadata.remarks: Component definition mapping the capstone GRC baseline controls to NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 and SOC 2 TSC. Primary framework is SOC 2 Type II. NIST controls are used as the underlying catalog because SOC 2 TSC maps directly to them and OSCAL has a published NIST 800-53 catalog.

components.title: Acme Health Patient Intake Lambda
components.description: AWS Lambda function that accepts patient intake submissions via API Gateway, writes to DynamoDB, and stores attachments in S3. Processes PHI. Deployed in a VPC with private subnets.

control-implementations.description: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls implemented by the Acme Health intake workload GRC baseline. SOC 2 TSC cross-references are noted in each requirement.

implemented-requirements.description: Protection of Information at Rest (SOC 2 CC6.1). SSE-KMS with customer CMK alias/acme-health-intake-phi is applied to aws_s3_bucket.uploads and aws_dynamodb_table.intake_cmk. Key rotation is enabled (enable_key_rotation=true). GAP-01 and GAP-02 are closed by module.baseline.aws_kms_key.phi and the server_side_encryption block on the CMK DynamoDB table.

links.text: Signed pipeline evidence bundle containing tfplan.json showing SSE-KMS configuration on uploads bucket and CMK DynamoDB table.

implemented-requirements.description: Transmission Integrity and Confidentiality (SOC 2 CC6.7). S3 bucket policy on aws_s3_bucket.uploads denies all requests where aws:SecureTransport=false. This ensures PHI attachments cannot be transmitted over HTTP. GAP-03 is closed by module.baseline.aws_s3_bucket_policy.uploads.

links.text: tfplan.json showing DenyNonTLS bucket policy statement on uploads bucket.

implemented-requirements.description: Boundary Protection (SOC 2 CC6.6). aws_lambda_function.intake is deployed with vpc_config referencing private subnets subnet-0d26c2347d18ee4d8 and subnet-00f6b54aa65e638bc. Egress is restricted to HTTPS (port 443) only via aws_security_group.lambda. VPC Gateway endpoints for DynamoDB and S3 prevent data from traversing the public internet. GAP-05 is closed.

links.text: tfplan.json showing vpc_config block on Lambda with private subnet IDs and security group.

implemented-requirements.description: Software, Firmware, and Information Integrity — Monitoring (SOC 2 CC7.2). X-Ray active tracing is enabled on the Lambda (tracing_config.mode=Active). Failed async invocations route to SQS DLQ acme-health-intake-dlq-316391d2 for visibility. API Gateway access logs are written to CloudWatch log group /aws/apigateway/acme-health-intake-316391d2 with 90-day retention. GAP-06 and GAP-08 are closed.

links.text: tfplan.json showing X-Ray tracing_config, DLQ destination_config, and API GW access_log_settings.

implemented-requirements.description: Least Privilege (SOC 2 CC6.3). aws_iam_role_policy.lambda_least_privilege replaces the original wildcard policy (dynamodb:*, s3:*) with specific actions: dynamodb:PutItem, GetItem, UpdateItem, Query on the intake table; s3:PutObject, GetObject on the uploads bucket prefix. GAP-07 is closed. The Rego policy gap07_iam_least_privilege.rego detects any future regression to wildcard actions at plan time.

links.text: OPA policy evaluation output confirming gap07_iam_least_privilege deny is empty on the compliant plan.

implemented-requirements.description: Audit Record Generation (SOC 2 CC7.2). AWS CloudTrail trail acme-health-intake-mgmt is multi-region, includes global service events, and has log file validation enabled. Trail logs are encrypted with the PHI CMK and stored in S3 bucket acme-health-intake-cloudtrail-316391d2. This ensures all AWS API calls are recorded with tamper-evident SHA-256 digests.

links.text: tfplan.json showing CloudTrail resource with enable_log_file_validation=true and kms_key_id.

implemented-requirements.description: Availability — Data Recovery (SOC 2 A1.2). Versioning is enabled on aws_s3_bucket.uploads, preventing PHI overwrites from being unrecoverable. Point-in-time recovery is available for any overwritten object. GAP-04 is closed by module.baseline.aws_s3_bucket_versioning.uploads.

links.text: tfplan.json showing versioning_configuration status=Enabled on uploads bucket.
